title: Cork in a Jug
body: A host pours the remnants of several bottles of wine into a jug after a party. The host then inserts a cork with a $$2.00-cm$$ diameter into the bottle, placing it in direct contact with the wine. The host is amazed when the host pounds the cork into place and the bottom of the jug (with a $$14.0-cm$$ diameter) breaks away.
